_comment: Calibration corpus: synthetic cr-battery review envelope modelling the incident-2026-1507 failure pattern (2026-06-10). Four independent cr-battery passes each scored >=9.0 while the diff contained a Critical blocker (waitForResponseComplete short-circuits to 'complete' at ~700ms on the Azure-via-failover path, ceiling never fires). The pattern: all reviewers emitted clean-dimension verdicts with prose-only justification -- no evidence blocks. The verifier caps each prose-only dimension at 7.0; if the verifier had been mandatory the effective aggregate score would have collapsed below the 9.2 threshold.
_corpus_policy: Each production incident where cr-battery issues a false-positive PASS adds one synthetic envelope. Entry criterion: a wiki incident report exists at github.com/your-org/your-repo/wiki

clean_dimensions.claim: waitForResponseComplete correctly handles all paths including Azure-via-failover
No-mark path (pendingMarkPromises empty) is handled by the ceiling backstop
No security-class signals in the diff
Change is isolated to waitForResponseComplete and its two call sites
New regression test covers the greeting-complete path
